{{- $projectName := .Site.Title -}}
{{- $description := .Site.Params.description | default "Documentation site for Lesstruct." -}}
# {{ $projectName }}

> {{ $description }}

## Pages

{{- range .Site.Sections.ByWeight }}
### {{ .Title | default (humanize .Section) }}

{{- range .Pages.ByWeight }}
{{- $title := "" -}}
{{- if .Title -}}
  {{- $title = .Title -}}
{{- else -}}
  {{- $h1 := index (findRE "^#\\s+([^\n]+)" .RawContent 1) 0 -}}
  {{- if $h1 -}}
    {{- $title = replaceRE "^#\\s+" "" $h1 -}}
  {{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- if not $title -}}
  {{- $title = .File.BaseFileName | humanize | title -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- $desc := printf "Reference page at %s." .RelPermalink -}}
{{- with .Description -}}
  {{- $desc = . | plainify | chomp -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- if gt (len $desc) 220 -}}
  {{- $desc = printf "%s…" (substr $desc 0 220) -}}
{{- end -}}
- [{{ $title }}]({{ .RelPermalink }}index.html): {{ $desc }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

## Optional

- [Full documentation (single file)](/llms-full.txt): All pages concatenated in section order, suitable for a single context window.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable page index.
- [Markdown sources on GitHub](https://github.com/aristorinjuang/lesstruct/tree/main/docs): The source of truth for every doc on this site.
